# 良い忍耐と悪い忍耐

いけない忍耐
良い忍耐
　アッラーのみのための忍耐
　アッラーの助けによる忍耐
アッラーとの関係
アッラーを真似ること
苦悩と悲しみをアッラーに訴えることについて
　アユーブ（祝福と平安あれ）の例? 

- Bad: Keeping away from God and His love and His will. 
- Good Type 1: Patience for the sake of God
- Good Type 2: Patience by the help of God 
   - 52:48 “…for verily you are in Our eyes”
   - 16:127 “…for your patience is but by God
- Companionship with God 
   - Hadith: “I am his hearing with which he hears, his sight which he sees…”
- Emulating the attributes of God
  - Hadith (about Dawud ﷺ): “Have My attributes, as one of My attributes is that I am patient.”
- On Complaining to God
  - This is acceptable and was the practice of the prophets. 
  - We will look into this more deeply soon.
  - The example of Ayyub ﷺ
